question: Does the image clearly depict a piano keyboard?
Is the image framed from a directly overhead (top-down) perspective?
Is the image a close-up view, with the keyboard filling the majority of the frame?
Does the image display at least two full octaves (showing the 2-black and 3-black key pattern at least twice)?
Do the black keys follow the correct repeating pattern of alternating groups of two and three?
Are the black keys correctly depicted as shorter and narrower than the white keys?
Are the black keys correctly positioned between the white keys (set back and raised), rather than flush or misaligned?
